race.comment: RAINSUN (4) goes on top. He showed good speed and ran a good race on debut at Wodonga, sitting on pace and boxing on well for second. He'll roll forward and should take beating with natural improvement in what looks a pretty thin race. ERUPT (2) was found out in a strongly run VRC St Leger over 2800m. The placing prior at Pakenham was good, back to 1715m here off a let-up is the query. DUKE OF CLARENCE (1) draws for a nice run after doing too much work last time. The placing prior has him in the each way mix. WHO'LLSTOPLORRAINE (14) hasn't had things go her way her past couple. She can roll forward and run an improved race.
